title: Salvation (flagship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the ship commanded by [[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]]|[[Salvation (medical frigate)|the Nebulon-B]] from the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|Star Wars: X-Wing]] game}} {{Cleanup}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Salvation-TFU2.jpg]] |name=''Salvation'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model=[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat]] [[Galaxy-15 ion engine/Legends|Galaxy-15 ion engines]] (7)[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' novelization]] |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*[[Fusion Accelerator Cannon]] (Prototype #S33J)''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' *Quadruple [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] |complement= |bays=Deck 7 |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Flagship/Legends|Flagship]] |commission= |destroyed=1 BBY, [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] |retired= |battles=*[[Skirmish over Ylesia]] *[[Mission to Druckenwell]] *[[Mission to Selonia]] *[[Mission to Kuat]] *[[Raid on Cato Neimoidia]] *[[Battle near the Itani Nebula]] *[[Assault on Kamino]] |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |navy=[[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]] |crewmembers=*[[PROXY]] *[[Nitram]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Soldiers of the Rebellion. Soldiers of the ''Salvation''. This is the beginning. Remember this moment.|Juno Eclipse, to the crew of the ''Salvation'' on the day of its inauguration|}} The '''''Salvation''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] that served under the [[Alliance Starbird|banner]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], one of the first of many starships added to the growing [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. Originally a vessel of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the frigate's service in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] was ended after its capture at the [[Skirmish over Ylesia|Skirmish over]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. During its inauguration as the Alliance [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], former [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]]-turned-Rebel fugitive [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] bestowed the name ''Salvation'' upon the frigate in order to symbolize the importance of the rebel cause and their desperate struggle against the Empire. ==Characteristics== The ''Salvation'' was a large frigate capable of carrying various squads of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], [[Z-95_Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]]. It had various defense mechanisms such as force fields, defensive cannons, and turbolaser guns. The vessel was also fitted with a [[Fusion Accelerator Cannon]]. ==History== ===Trialling the ship=== {{Quote|Blackout to Blackguard. Respond, please."
"I don't have time to talk."
"Bad luck. This is taking too long. You need to pull out."
"Negative, Blackout. Leave if you want to. I'm staying to finish the job.|Juno Eclipse to Rahm Kota during the Salvation's first mission to Cato Neimoidia|}} Under the command of [[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]], a former [[Captain/Legends|Imperial Captain]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Rogue Shadow]]'', the ''Salvation'' was first tested against Imperial forces at [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]]. Although Captain Eclipse succeeded in achieving her mission objectives to test both her ship and crew in battle, the Empire's superior military and numbers forced the ''Salvation'' to withdraw, mainly due to the fact that the Alliance could not afford to lose what few ships it had at the time. [[File:Rebel_fleet_TFU2.png|thumb|left|200px|Starkiller and Rahm Kota approach the ''Salvation''.]] ===Battle on the ''Salvation''=== When [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Rahm Kota/Legends|Rahm Kota]] and uncertain Starkiller arrived at the Alliance Fleet's hidden location in the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]], the ''Salvation'' was [[Battle near the Itani Nebula|attacked]] and boarded by Vader's [[Imperial Terror Soldier|experimental elite forces]] led by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The ship's crew was caught completely off guard and were unable to prevent Fett and his [[Terror Trooper|troopers]] from storming the bridge and capturing Captain Eclipse. After [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] succeeded in escaping from the ship with Fett and his prisoner, the Alliance Fleet pursued the bounty hunter to Kamino with General Kota in command of the ''Salvation''. The ship's infrastructure was heavily damaged by a [[Terror Walker]]. ===Battle of Kamino=== {{Main|Assault on Kamino}} [[File:Rebel_fleet_Kamino.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Salvation'' and other Rebel ships exiting from hyperspace above Kamino.]] When The ''Salvation'' and the other Rebel ships arrived at [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], The ''Salvation'' was assaulted by many boarding parties. [[Subject 1138|Starkiller]] was forced to eliminate all of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] troopers that had infiltrated the ship's hangar. The ship's condition continued to deteriorate, losing four decks due to the damage sustained. Its main cannon was disabled by a shot from an incoming Star Destroyer, though Starkiller retaliated by charging up the cannon with Force lightning and firing a shot that blew the Destroyer in half. [[File:Salvation_crash_Kamino.png|thumb|right|200px|The ''Salvation'' crashing into [[Timira City]].]] ===Destruction=== {{Dialogue|Wedge Antilles|We're getting ripped apart up here! Order the retreat!|Kota|No! We won't get another chance on taking this target. Keep pressing the attack! The planetary shield is preventing any kind of ground assault.|PROXY|And the ship is falling apart. We've already lost decks 8 through 12.|Starkiller|Head to the ''Rogue Shadow''. I'm pretty sure those shields can't take a direct hit from a cruiser.|Kota|Abandon ship! Abandon ship! Are you sure about this?"|Starkiller|Well, it's the only thing I can think of. Just be ready to clean up after me.|attr=Rahm Kota and Starkiller deciding to use the ''Salvation'' as a missile|src=}} Later during the [[Assault on Kamino|battle]], Kota ordered the remaining crew members to abandon the ship so that Starkiller could guide the ''Salvation'' directly into the planet in order to destroy its [[Planetary shield/Legends|shields]]. The ''Salvation'' punched through the shields with ease, and despite the Imperial garrison's attempts to shoot it down before it ploughed into the city, the ''Salvation'' crashed directly into the shield generator, destroying it and much of the [[Timira City]] [[Cloning/Legends|Cloning Facility]]; the major fragments of debris were destroyed by Starkiller in order to prevent any harm from coming to Juno. With Kamino's defense grid destroyed by the ''Salvation''{{'s}} sacrifice, the Rebel forces invaded Kamino and, despite the many casualties they suffered, the Alliance succeeded in winning the battle while Starkiller subdued Darth Vader himself. ===Legacy=== While the ''Salvation'' was lost over Kamino, both her captain and the fleet would survive to fight another day. ==Behind the scenes== In the Wii port of ''The Force Unleashed II'', the ''Salvation'' is depicted as an [[Assault Frigate Mark I]]. The ship's destruction is depicted differently as well: Starkiller does not fall next to the ship—instead he rides it into the planetary shield generator and releases a massive [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force_Repulse|force repulse]] which causes the destruction of the vessel. However, not all of the ship was actually destroyed by Starkiller, as he later used what remained of its hull as a bridge between Timira City's hangar dock and the main cloning facility. Starkiller also has to stop several [[Incinerator war droid]]s from toasting the communication arrays of the ship. The ''Salvation'' is depicted as being vastly larger than all other Nebulon-B frigates that have appeared in ''Star Wars'' works. In the game footage, the ''Rogue Shadow'' is infinitesimally smaller than the ''Salvation'' as it flies across its connecting spar, even though the ''Rogue Shadow'', at 65 meters long, is just under one-fifth the length of the 300 meter Nebulon-B. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (audiobook)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Salvation (Lazarett- und Eskortschiff) |es=Salvación |it=Salvation (Nebulon-B) }} [[Category:EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] [[Category:Flagships]] [[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
